title: Cipher Mining December 2024 Operational Update - Odessa Upgrade Complete
text: Bitcoin Production: Mined approximately 234 BTC in December. Sold 271 BTC during month. Ended December holding 1,344 BTC (including ~345 BTC pledged as collateral). Hashrate Performance: Month-end operating hashrate: 13.5 EH/s (exahashes per second). Fleet efficiency: 18.9 J/TH (joules per terahash). Mining Infrastructure: 75,000 deployed mining rigs. Completed upgrade of mining fleet at Odessa facility. Substantial progress on Black Pearl data center development. CEO Tyler Page noted: We are thrilled to announce completion of Odessa upgrade, giving Cipher ~13.5 EH/s of self-mining hashrate with one of most efficient fleets of mining rigs in industry at ~18.9 J/TH. Notable Achievement: Despite power provider utilizing curtailment options during December, Cipher's enhanced technology stack enabled operations for approximately 80 hours when they would have otherwise been curtailed.
